gaps.detectionLogic: Mechanical valve (Z95.2) + INR below target range at last check
gaps.name: Mechanical valve + sub-therapeutic INR
gaps.structuredDataElements: Mech valve Z-code or history, INR target, INR value

gaps.detectionLogic: Mechanical valve + any DOAC on active med list
gaps.name: Mechanical valve: DOAC prescribed (CRITICAL SAFETY)

gaps.detectionLogic: Standard mechanical AVR on INR target 2.0-3.0 (should be 2.5-3.5 for most)
gaps.name: Mechanical AVR INR target mismatch (non-On-X)

gaps.detectionLogic: On-X AVR >3mo post-op on INR 2.5-3.5 (eligible for 1.5-2.0 + ASA 81)
gaps.name: On-X mechanical AVR: eligible lower INR not adopted
gaps.structuredDataElements: On-X valve model, operative date, INR target

gaps.detectionLogic: Mechanical MVR on INR target 2.0-3.0
gaps.name: Mechanical MVR INR target (2.5-3.5) not met

gaps.detectionLogic: Mechanical valve without low-dose ASA adjunct when indicated
gaps.name: Mechanical valve + ASA 81 adjunct gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Mech valve + recent procedure without documented bridging plan
gaps.name: Mechanical valve bridging strategy for procedure
gaps.structuredDataElements: Mech valve, procedure date, LMWH/heparin orders

gaps.detectionLogic: Chronic warfarin + repeated TTR<65% without CYP2C9/VKORC1 testing discussed
gaps.name: Warfarin pharmacogenomics in unstable INR

gaps.detectionLogic: Mechanical valve on chronic warfarin without home INR option discussed
gaps.name: Home INR monitoring eligible but not offered
gaps.structuredDataElements: Mech valve, INR frequency, home monitor

gaps.detectionLogic: Bioprosthetic valve (Z95.3) without annual echo
gaps.name: Bioprosthetic valve surveillance echo gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Serial echo gradient rise >=10 mmHg or new PVL on bio valve
gaps.name: Bioprosthetic structural valve deterioration (SVD) signs

gaps.detectionLogic: TAVR without 4D CT at 30d-1y to screen for HALT
gaps.name: Post-TAVR HALT (subclinical leaflet thrombosis) detection

gaps.detectionLogic: HALT on imaging without short-course anticoagulation
gaps.name: Post-TAVR HALT confirmed: anticoagulation consideration

gaps.detectionLogic: Recent surgical bio AVR without 3-6 mo post-op anticoagulation
gaps.name: Post-SAVR bioprosthetic: 3-6 month warfarin bridge gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Recent bio MVR without 3-6 mo post-op warfarin
gaps.name: Post-bioprosthetic MVR: 3-6 month warfarin gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Bioprosthetic valve >6mo post-op without ASA 81 lifelong
gaps.name: Bioprosthetic valve lifelong ASA gap

gaps.detectionLogic: SVD of prior SAVR without heart team discussion
gaps.name: Failed SAVR bioprosthesis: ViV-TAVR vs redo SAVR discussion
gaps.structuredDataElements: Prior SAVR, SVD, heart team referral

gaps.detectionLogic: Primary AVR age>70 with mechanical valve without shared decision documented
gaps.name: Prosthesis selection: age-based mismatch (mech in elderly)

gaps.detectionLogic: AVR age<50 with bioprosthetic without re-operation discussion documented
gaps.name: Prosthesis selection: bio in young without shared decision

gaps.detectionLogic: Severe AS + unexplained GIB without vWF multimer assessment
gaps.name: Heyde syndrome screening in severe AS + GIB

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-AVR iEOA<0.65 cm2/m2 without PPM flagged
gaps.name: Patient-prosthesis mismatch (PPM) detection iEOA<0.65

gaps.detectionLogic: Severe PPM post-AVR without intervention consideration
gaps.name: Severe PPM (iEOA<0.55): management consideration

gaps.detectionLogic: AVR + small root + bioprosthetic indicated without sutureless option eval
gaps.name: Sutureless/rapid-deployment valve candidate eval

gaps.detectionLogic: AVR candidate age<50 without Ross procedure discussion
gaps.name: Ross procedure candidate: young AVR patient eval

gaps.detectionLogic: Aortic root disease + preserved leaflets without David procedure eval
gaps.name: Valve-sparing root (David procedure) for aortic root disease

gaps.detectionLogic: Aortic root surgery candidate without David vs Yacoub discussion
gaps.name: Yacoub remodeling: anatomy-specific suitability

gaps.detectionLogic: Root aneurysm + AV disease without composite graft (Bentall) eval
gaps.name: Bentall procedure for root + valve disease

gaps.detectionLogic: Small root + AVR without stentless valve option considered
gaps.name: Stentless valve consideration in small root

gaps.detectionLogic: AVR candidate with pericardial preservation option not discussed
gaps.name: Ozaki procedure (AV neocuspidization) consideration

gaps.detectionLogic: Primary MR surgical candidate at low-repair-rate center
gaps.name: MV repair rate gap: reference center referral

gaps.detectionLogic: Isolated primary MV disease without minimally invasive/robotic option
gaps.name: Robotic MVR candidacy not discussed

gaps.detectionLogic: MV replacement done without documented repair feasibility assessment
gaps.name: MV repair vs replacement: repair feasibility documentation

gaps.detectionLogic: MV replacement without chordal preservation documentation
gaps.name: Chordal preservation during MVR: technique documentation

gaps.detectionLogic: MR candidate without heart team documented device vs surgery decision
gaps.name: MitraClip/TEER vs surgery: heart team decision

gaps.detectionLogic: Complex MV anatomy + incomplete repair without Alfieri stitch consideration
gaps.name: Alfieri edge-to-edge surgical repair for complex MR

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-MV surgery without post-op monitoring for AF 30d

gaps.name: IE suspected: TTE first before TEE appropriately

gaps.detectionLogic: BCN IE without serology for Coxiella, Bartonella, Tropheryma
gaps.name: Blood culture-negative IE: expanded workup gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Prosthetic valve IE without FDG-PET/CT in diagnostic workup

gaps.name: IE: IDU/MDT coordination documented

gaps.detectionLogic: aureus bacteremia: TEE indication adherence. S. aureus BSI (any) without TEE performed

gaps.name: Streptococcus bovis/gallolyticus: colonoscopy gap

gaps.name: HACEK organisms: recognition and treatment

gaps.name: Fungal IE: surgical consideration strongly indicated

gaps.name: IE + acute HF: urgent surgery indicated

gaps.name: IE + perivalvular abscess: surgical indication

gaps.detectionLogic: PVE + dehiscence/fistula without surgical referral
gaps.name: PVE with dehiscence or fistula: urgent surgery

gaps.detectionLogic: IE + recurrent embolic event on abx without surgical eval
gaps.name: IE + embolic event on therapy: surgery consideration

gaps.detectionLogic: IE + vegetation >10mm without surgical discussion
gaps.name: IE + large mobile vegetation (>10mm): surgery consideration

gaps.detectionLogic: Right-sided IE + IVDU + persistent bacteremia without multi-D discussion

gaps.detectionLogic: Prosthetic valve (Z95.2/Z95.3) + dental procedure without amoxicillin 2g
gaps.name: IE prophylaxis pre-dental: prosthetic valve

gaps.name: IE prophylaxis: prior IE pre-dental procedure

gaps.name: IE prophylaxis: unrepaired cyanotic CHD + procedure

gaps.name: IE prophylaxis: prior CHD repair with residual defect + procedure

gaps.detectionLogic: MVP or native valve disease without high-risk category receiving prophylaxis
gaps.name: IE prophylaxis: inappropriate use (no indication)

gaps.detectionLogic: Mech valve + gradient rise >=50% from baseline without thrombosis workup
gaps.name: Mechanical prosthetic valve thrombosis detection: elevated gradient

gaps.detectionLogic: Suspected PVT without fluoroscopic leaflet motion assessment

gaps.name: Post-PVT: anticoagulation intensification

gaps.name: Post-valve AF: anticoagulation maintenance

gaps.name: 30-day post-op echo gap

gaps.name: Carcinoid heart: TV/PV surveillance echo

gaps.name: Severe chronic AR asymptomatic: surgical thresholds
